mapper.sql: id, user_id, change_type, before_amount, after_amount, change_amount, create_time, order_no, notes, remarks
mapper.select: SELECT SUBSTR(a.parent_path,1,locate('/',a.parent_path)-1) AS userId,sum(b.change_amount) as freezeAmount FROM ct_merchant a JOIN ct_merchant_amount_records b on a.user_id = b.user_id WHERE b.create_time >= #{startTime} and b.create_time <= #{endTime} AND b.amount_type = 2 AND b.change_type = 1 GROUP BY SUBSTR(a.parent_path,1,locate('/',a.parent_path)-1)

SELECT a.user_id,sum(b.change_amount) as freezeAmount FROM ct_merchant a JOIN ct_merchant_amount_records b on a.user_id = b.user_id WHERE b.create_time >= #{startTime} and b.create_time <= #{endTime} AND b.amount_type = 2 AND b.change_type = 1 GROUP BY a.user_id

SELECT a.user_id,sum(b.change_amount) as change_amount FROM ct_merchant a JOIN ct_merchant_amount_records b on a.user_id = b.user_id WHERE b.create_time >= #{startTime} and b.create_time <= #{endTime} AND b.amount_type = 1 AND (b.change_type = 2) GROUP BY a.user_id
